message:
fix(codegen): Migrate delete.zig to builder API

- Replace all 25 emit calls with b.write/b.writeIndent/b.writeFmt
- Use captureExpr + emitValue for all 10 genExpr calls
- Handle complex nested logic (list slice deletion, dict remove)
- Pattern: capture all expressions → build code → single flush
- 124 lines, 25 emit + 10 genExpr fully migrated
- Tests passing: unary 13/13, longexp 1/1
